tasks.title: Fix OAuth token refresh
tasks.context: Google OAuth tokens expire every 7 days. Need to move app out of testing mode.

tasks.title: Write blog post about agent memory
tasks.context: Draft started. Key insight: stateless → stateful is the real unlock.

tasks.title: Migrate database to Supabase
tasks.context: Migration complete. RLS policies set. All queries verified.

decisions.description: Use cron + flat files over a database for agent memory
decisions.context: Simplicity wins. JSON + markdown + cron beats Postgres for a single-agent system. Can always upgrade later.
5min was too noisy — catching partial conversations. 15min captures complete thought cycles.

threads.notes: Building the memory loop. Short-term (context windows) → medium-term (daily notes) → long-term (MEMORY.md). STATE.json is the task backbone.
README drafted. Need examples, tests, pyproject.toml. Target: pip installable by end of week.
Workaround (daily cron check) works. Real fix (production OAuth) blocked on Google review.
